basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website nitrkl.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for candidates belonging to Schedule Castes / Schedule Tribes / PWD and Female applicants. Age relaxation is applicable up to 3 years for OBCs (Non-creamy layer candidates).

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in science / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in science OR 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology. One Year Hands-on Experience. Minimum 50% in all examinations.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
